category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a C library and command-line tool to generate regular expressions; official rgxg.github.io homepage says the same.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rgxg; official rgxg homepage title is rgxg.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides usage, source, and support information; it points to the GitHub repository and README for source verification details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rgxg/rgxg; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify rgxg as a CLI and C library for generating regular expressions.
